The scope of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is limited to domestic and commercial purposes as the medical and aviation sectors are using AI to enhance their services. In this article, we will discuss the rising scope in AI. In this article, we will be discussing factors that can ease your path in choosing a career.
Immense Prospects
AI is one of the fastest-growing and most exciting fields today. It is at the forefront of technological advancements, and its applications span across various industries, including healthcare, finance, manufacturing, transportation, and entertainment. The demand for AI professionals is continuously increasing, creating abundant career opportunities.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Highly in Demand
The demand for AI professionals exceeds the available talent pool, leading to a shortage of skilled AI practitioners. This scarcity of AI expertise translates into competitive salaries and attractive compensation packages for those entering the field. AI specialists often enjoy higher-than-average salaries and excellent career growth prospects.
Poddar International College provides good exposure to industries and organizes many Workshops and Seminars to enhance the students’ professional knowledge of technical fields like IT.
Wide Range of Applications
AI has a wide range of applications, making it a versatile career path. You can work on diverse projects, such as developing intelligent systems, designing recommendation engines, enhancing natural language processing, improving computer vision, optimizing business processes or even creating autonomous vehicles.
Poddar International College recently organized a ‘Tech Exhibition’ where the IT students developed many AI-based devices.
Rewarding Career
Working in AI involves solving complex problems and pushing the boundaries of what machines can accomplish. The field demands continuous learning and keeps you intellectually challenged. The pursuit of building intelligent systems and developing cutting-edge algorithms provides a stimulating and intellectually rewarding career.
Poddar International College ensures best placements for IT students. Most of the students are well settled in renowned companies after completing their Education.
Innovative Sector
AI is a field of constant innovation and evolution. As an AI professional, you will be at the forefront of adopting new technologies, exploring novel approaches, and staying updated with the latest research. The dynamic nature of the field ensures continuous learning and personal growth.
Poddar International College and University Centre of Computer Science & Information Technology (UCCS & IT), University of Rajasthan, Jaipur jointly organized an International Conference on Global Challenges and Opportunities: National Education Policy-2020 and Indian Knowledge System recently.
Entrepreneurial Opportunities
AI-driven startups are proliferating, and the field provides a fertile ground for entrepreneurship. If you have an innovative idea, AI expertise can help you develop and commercialize intelligent products or services. The combination of AI skills and entrepreneurial spirit can open doors to building one’s own successful ventures.
The IT students of Poddar International College participated in a cyber-security event ‘Hackathon’ where they assisted Rajasthan Police in addressing cyber-crime issues.
Global Relevance and Impact
AI is a global phenomenon, with advancements and applications being explored worldwide. A career in AI can offer international opportunities, allowing one to work on projects of global significance and collaborate with professionals from different countries and cultures.
With its exponential growth and potential for impact, pursuing a career in AI offers a combination of professional satisfaction, financial rewards and the opportunity to contribute to cutting-edge technological advancements.
Poddar International College, one of the top IT colleges in Jaipur provides best Education in BCA and MCA along with other diverse courses.
